---
title: "Protocols"
subtitle: "Field methods, manuals and compatible monitoring workflows for Rede C2 and partner networks"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: false
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
---

<!-- Rede C2: protocols page — hero limpo, sem sobreposição, alinhado à home -->

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --rc2-red:        #A93632;
  --rc2-red-dark:   #6E1F1D;
  --rc2-green:      #626A38;
  --rc2-green-dark: #2E3B24;
  --rc2-green-soft: #D7DDC5;
  --rc2-ochre:      #D99A27;
  --rc2-cream:      #F6F1E8;
  --rc2-paper:      #FFFDF7;
  --rc2-ink:        #171717;
  --rc2-muted:      #675F55;
  --rc2-line:       rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  --rc2-shadow:     0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);

  --rc2-safe-gutter: clamp(0.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem);
  --rc2-content-max: 1260px;
  --rc2-wide-max:    1480px;
  --rc2-xl-max:      1560px;
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.86)),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-position: center top;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

img,
video,
iframe,
svg,
canvas {
  max-width: 100%;
}

a {
  color: var(--rc2-red);
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main,
main.content,
.page-columns,
.page-columns .content {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

main.content {
  background: transparent;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 0 3.5rem 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block,
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Navbar */
.navbar {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.navbar .navbar-brand,
.navbar .nav-link {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.navbar .nav-link.active-section {
  color: var(--rc2-red) !important;
  font-weight: 800;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rc2-red);
}

/* =========================================================
   HERO — LIMPO E SEM SOBREPOSIÇÃO
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-page-hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
  min-height: clamp(620px, 88vh, 860px);
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  color: #fff;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 14%, rgba(217,154,39,0.38), transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 82%, rgba(169,54,50,0.26), transparent 36%),
    linear-gradient(108deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.84) 0%, rgba(46,59,36,0.82) 42%, rgba(110,31,29,0.72) 100%),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.rc2-page-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.40) 0%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 46%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.56) 100%
    ),
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.055) 0 1px,
      transparent 1px 16px
    );
  pointer-events: none;
}

.rc2-page-hero::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 5px;
  z-index: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(
    180deg,
    var(--rc2-ochre) 0%,
    var(--rc2-red) 50%,
    var(--rc2-green) 100%
  );
}

.rc2-page-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  width: min(1360px, calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(4.8rem, 8vw, 7.3rem) 0 clamp(3rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 0.28fr);
  gap: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 4.5rem);
  align-items: center;
}

.rc2-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.82rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.24);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.9vw, 0.76rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.7s ease both;
}

.rc2-kicker::before {
  content: "";
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217,154,39,0.28);
}

.rc2-page-hero h1 {
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0;
  max-width: 900px;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: clamp(3.8rem, 8.5vw, 8.2rem);
  line-height: 0.80;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 0 10px 42px rgba(0,0,0,0.54);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.1s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-line {
  display: block;
}

.rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
  margin-left: clamp(1.4rem, 6vw, 5.4rem);
}

.rc2-title-rule {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1.05rem 0 1.25rem;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.2s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-rule::before {
  content: "";
  flex: 0 0 clamp(36px, 5vw, 72px);
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.rc2-title-rule::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
}

.rc2-page-hero p {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.9vw, 1.34rem);
  line-height: 1.58;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.42);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.28s ease both;
}

/* Palavras-chave slim */
.rc2-keywords {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.36s ease both;
}

.rc2-keyword {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.78rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.46);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.26);
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.93);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.78vw, 0.72rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.rc2-keyword--red   { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-red); }
.rc2-keyword--green { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-green-soft); }
.rc2-keyword--ochre { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-keyword--cream { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-cream); }

/* Card lateral menor e discreto */
.rc2-hero-logo-card {
  align-self: center;
  justify-self: end;
  width: min(270px, 100%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.45rem);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.18);
  box-shadow:
    0 22px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.20),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.18s ease both;
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card img {
  width: clamp(88px, 8vw, 132px);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.36));
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.15);
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.78);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(0.84rem, 1.1vw, 0.96rem);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* =========================================================
   SEÇÕES PADRÃO
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-section,
.content-card {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.08), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.88));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  border-top: 5px solid var(--rc2-green);
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc2-section--wide {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
}

.rc2-section-title {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.rc2-section-title::before {
  content: "";
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--rc2-ink);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.rc2-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-lead,
.lead {
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  color: #191711 !important;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.3rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}

.rc2-section p,
.content-card p {
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.72;
}

/* Grids e cards */
.rc2-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 280px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-grid-3 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-card,
.proto-card {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.rc2-card:hover,
.proto-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.rc2-card h3,
.proto-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.11em;
  line-height: 1.25;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-card p,
.proto-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--rc2-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Protocol-specific */
.protocol-index {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 220px), 1fr));
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 1.2rem;
}

.protocol-index a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.proto-subtitle {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7A5A18;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.pill-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  margin-top: 0.85rem;
}

.pill-links a {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.32rem 0.64rem;
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(169,54,50,0.24);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.64rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--rc2-red);
}

.rc2-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.1rem 0;
}

.rc2-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.32rem 0.72rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.84);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-pill--red {
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.32);
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
}

.rc2-pill--green {
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  border-color: rgba(98,106,56,0.32);
  background: rgba(98,106,56,0.09);
}

.rc2-pill--ochre {
  color: #7A5A18;
  border-color: rgba(217,154,39,0.42);
  background: rgba(217,154,39,0.10);
}

/* Workflow */
.method-river {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 24px;
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.method-step {
  min-height: 250px;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
}

.method-step:last-child {
  border-right: 0;
}

.method-number {
  display: inline-grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 3rem;
  height: 3rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rc2-red);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-weight: 900;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.method-step h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-size: 1.12rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.method-step p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--rc2-muted) !important;
  font-size: 0.9rem !important;
  line-height: 1.55 !important;
}

/* Animações */
@keyframes fadeSlideUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(42px);
  transition: opacity 0.72s ease, transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms);
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}

.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-ready {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }
}

/* Responsivo */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .rc2-page-hero-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-hero-logo-card {
    justify-self: start;
    max-width: 420px;
  }

  .method-river {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .method-step:nth-child(2) {
    border-right: 0;
  }

  .method-step {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .rc2-page-hero {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 16vw, 5.8rem);
  }

  .rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
    margin-left: 0;
  }

  .method-river {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .method-step {
    border-right: 0;
  }

  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 420px) {
  :root {
    --rc2-safe-gutter: 0.65rem;
  }

  .rc2-section,
  .content-card {
    padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem);
    border-radius: 22px;
  }
}

.html-widget,
.leaflet,
.leaflet-container,
iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-page-hero" id="protocols-hero" aria-label="RedeC2 protocols hero">

  <div class="rc2-page-hero-inner">

    <div>
      <div class="rc2-kicker">Field methods · Data standards · Partner manuals</div>

      <h1>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">Protocols</span>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">for C2</span>
      </h1>

      <div class="rc2-title-rule" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <p>
        Standardized methods keep field data comparable across sites, teams
        and years.
      </p>

      <div class="rc2-keywords" aria-label="Protocol keywords">
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--red">Caatinga</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--green">Cerrado</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--ochre">Permanent plots</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--cream">Data standards</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="rc2-hero-logo-card" aria-label="RedeC2 protocol identity">
      <img src="../figures/logoc2.png" alt="RedeC2 logo">
      <div class="rc2-hero-logo-card-divider"></div>
      <p>Field methods, harmonized tables and partner manuals.</p>
    </aside>

  </div>

</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="overview">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Protocol logic</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <div>
      <p class="rc2-lead">
        Rede C2 works with permanent plots in dry ecosystems and connects
        with broader monitoring initiatives.
      </p>

      <p>
        This page gathers core protocol references that can support plot
        establishment, remeasurement, field standardization, data harmonization
        and cross-network comparability.
      </p>
    </div>

    <aside class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Recommended anchor</h3>
      <p>
        The DRYFLOR field manual is especially relevant because it offers a
        standardized workflow for permanent plots in seasonally dry tropical
        forests, including plot layout, tagging, remeasurement and woody stem
        monitoring.
      </p>

      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.5521/forestplots.net/2020_4c" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DRYFLOR DOI</a>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </div>

  <div class="protocol-index" aria-label="Protocol shortcuts">
    <a class="rc2-card" href="#plot-establishment-and-remeasurement">
      <h3>Plots</h3>
      <p>Layout, tagging and remeasurement.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="rc2-card" href="#woody-stems-census">
      <h3>Woody stems</h3>
      <p>Diameter, recruits and mortality.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="rc2-card" href="#herb-layer-and-regeneration">
      <h3>Herbs</h3>
      <p>Regeneration and herb layer modules.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="rc2-card" href="#soils-traits-and-disturbance">
      <h3>Modules</h3>
      <p>Soils, traits and disturbance.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section rc2-section--wide" id="references">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Core protocol references</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-3">
    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>Rede C2</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Network base</div>
      <p>
        Space for Rede C2’s own protocols, field sheets and coding standards
        for plot installation, recensus, disturbance records, traits and soils.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="#plot-establishment-and-remeasurement">Plot protocol</a>
        <a href="#datasheets-and-field-sheets">Datasheets</a>
        <a href="#field-codes-and-data-standards">Field codes</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>DRYFLOR field manual</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Dry forest permanent plots</div>
      <p>
        A key manual for establishing and remeasuring permanent plots in
        seasonally dry tropical forests. Useful for woody stems, tagging rules
        and long-term comparability.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://www.dryflor.info/publications/protocols" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Protocols page</a>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.5521/forestplots.net/2020_4c" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Português</a>
        <a href="https://www.dryflor.info/files/Protocol_v1.2_English.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">English</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>ForestPlots.net</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Field resources</div>
      <p>
        Field resources, publications and practical material that support
        tropical plot monitoring and interoperability across networks.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://forestplots.net/pt/utilizando-o-forestplots/no-campo" target="_blank" rel="noopener">No campo</a>
        <a href="https://forestplots.net/en/publications" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Publications</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>SECO</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Dry tropics compatibility</div>
      <p>
        Protocol pages and modules aligned with DryFlor, ForestPlots and
        related networks for dry-tropics monitoring.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://blogs.ed.ac.uk/seco-project/science/protocols/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Protocols</a>
        <a href="https://blogs.ed.ac.uk/seco-project/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Project</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>SEOSAW</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Linked woodland modules</div>
      <p>
        Interoperable protocols and datasheets for woodland monitoring, useful
        as a reference for compatible modules and workflow design.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://seosaw.github.io/manuals.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Manuals</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="proto-card">
      <h3>Citation anchor</h3>
      <div class="proto-subtitle">Portuguese DRYFLOR manual</div>
      <p>
        Use the DOI as a stable citation anchor when referring to the Portuguese
        DRYFLOR field manual in Rede C2 methods and protocol references.
      </p>
      <div class="pill-links">
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.5521/forestplots.net/2020_4c" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="workflow">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Suggested Rede C2 workflow</h2></div>

  <div class="method-river">
    <article class="method-step" id="plot-establishment-and-remeasurement">
      <span class="method-number">01</span>
      <h3>Plot establishment and remeasurement</h3>
      <p>
        Plot geometry, subplot layout, coordinates, tagging, recensus intervals
        and replacement rules.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="method-step" id="woody-stems-census">
      <span class="method-number">02</span>
      <h3>Woody stems census</h3>
      <p>
        Diameter standards, multiple stems, damage codes, recruits, mortality
        and field note structure.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="method-step" id="herb-layer-and-regeneration">
      <span class="method-number">03</span>
      <h3>Herb layer and regeneration</h3>
      <p>
        Modules for herbs, seedlings and regeneration tracking compatible with
        dry-forest and savanna workflows.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="method-step" id="soils-traits-and-disturbance">
      <span class="method-number">04</span>
      <h3>Soils, traits and disturbance</h3>
      <p>
        Optional compatible modules inspired by partner networks to maximize
        interoperability and ecological interpretation.
      </p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="standards">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Datasheets and standards</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <article class="rc2-card" id="datasheets-and-field-sheets">
      <h3>Datasheets and field sheets</h3>
      <p>
        Minimum tables for recording plot metadata, stems, recruits, mortality,
        disturbance notes and observer information.
      </p>
      <div class="rc2-pills">
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--green">Plot metadata</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--red">Stems</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--ochre">Observers</span>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card" id="field-codes-and-data-standards">
      <h3>Field codes and data standards</h3>
      <p>
        Controlled vocabularies for species status, stem condition, damage,
        phenology, collection status and data-quality flags.
      </p>
      <div class="rc2-pills">
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--green">Controlled vocabulary</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--red">Quality flags</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--ochre">Harmonization</span>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".rc2-section, .content-card, .rc2-page-hero, .team-controls, .team-card"
  );

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 8) * 45}ms`);
  });

  if (
    window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches ||
    !("IntersectionObserver" in window)
  ) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
  } else {
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, {
      threshold: 0.12,
      rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
    });

    revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
  }

  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href]");

  if (sections.length && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

        const id = entry.target.id;

        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href") || "";
          link.classList.toggle("active-section", href.endsWith("#" + id));
        });
      });
    }, {
      rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px",
      threshold: 0
    });

    sections.forEach(section => navObserver.observe(section));
  }

});
</script>
```
